error_signature: Received tool input did not match expected schema
title: Input schema mismatch with MCP Server tool
symptom: The AI Agent encounters an error stating 'Received tool input did not match expected schema' when communicating with the MCP Server tool.
not_this_if: Error occurs with a different MCP Server
No error present in other workflows
root_cause: The error indicates that the input being sent to the MCP Server does not conform to the expected schema defined by the server. This can happen due to incorrect data formatting or missing required fields in the request.
fix_steps: Add a code node in the workflow before the MCP Server tool to log the output being sent.
Alternatively, enable the 'Return Intermediate Steps' option in the workflow settings to inspect the data being sent.
agent_instruction: Log the output being sent to the MCP Server to identify schema mismatches.
